# Days on Purpose

> Turn time into meaningful action.

Days on Purpose is a free, browser-based life expectancy calculator that reframes remaining time as "purpose-days" — a resource for clarity, focus, and intentional living. It is not a medical tool or mortality countdown.

## How It Works

1. Enter your **birth date**, **country**, and **gender**.
2. The app looks up the latest life expectancy at birth (WHO/World Bank data, 190+ countries).
3. It calculates your approximate remaining **days, weeks, months, and years** independently using 365.2425 days/year.
4. Results are presented with a positive, purpose-centric message encouraging daily intentional action.

## Key Facts

- **No backend** — all computation runs in the browser.
- **Data source**: WHO/World Bank life expectancy at birth by country and gender (2023).
- **Fallbacks**: If country+gender is unavailable, falls back to country total, then global average.
- **Privacy**: No data is sent to any server. Birth date and preferences are stored in Local Storage only.
- **Free**: No cost, no sign-up.

## Inputs

- `birth_date`: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `country`: One of 190+ supported countries (auto-detected via IP geolocation)
- `gender`: female or male

## Outputs

- **Days**: remaining_years × 365.2425
- **Weeks**: days ÷ 7
- **Months**: remaining_years × 12
- **Years**: remaining_years (decimal)
- **40-Day Blocks**: days ÷ 40
- **100-Day Blocks**: days ÷ 100
- A motivational message: "What will you invest one day in today?"

## Tone & Philosophy

- Purpose-first, never fear-based.
- Uses "days for your journey" and "purpose-days" rather than "time left" or "countdown."
- Encourages daily micro-actions: setting goals, logging reflections, celebrating wins.

## Author

Richard Crane

## URL

https://daysonpurpose.com/
